businessRules: Recursive dependency extraction supporting ref(), vh(), and children/hijos references.
Cycle detection and duplicate ID validation in the dependency graph.
Bidirectional calculation engine using Decimal.js for precision and expr-eval for formula parsing.

businessRules: Social security ratios: 14% (10.1) and 5% (10.2) based on total salaries.
Strict calculation chain for cost sheets (Rules 6-13) covering Total Cost (12.1), Price (13.2), Taxes (13.3), and Unit Prices (15.1, 16.1).
name: validations.ts
user_description: Módulo del sistema para gestionar validations.ts.

businessRules: Matching Engine 7-pass strategy: AUTO_COMPLETE (1.0), HARD_REF (0.95), EXACT_SUM (1.0), PRICE_FLEX (0.85), WILDCARDS (0.80), TOLERANCE (0.70), CASH_FILL (0.50).
Implements stock limit checks and allows/disallows negative stock based on configuration.
Automatic decomposition in createLine when physical stock is insufficient.
business_logic: Implementa la lógica central de reconciliación de transacciones bancarias con productos del catálogo, manejando descomposiciones y ajustes de precio.
name: engine.ts
technical_description: Motor de conciliación IPV (Inventario vs Venta). Ejecuta algoritmos de cuadre multi-paso.
user_description: Módulo del sistema para gestionar engine.ts.

businessRules: Greedy unit decomposition algorithm for BOX, PACK, and UNIT levels.
Demand rounding to the nearest multiple of 10.
Inventory reconstruction modes: Mode A (Only Sales), Mode B (Sales + Existing Receipts), Mode C (Stock Goal).
Automatic generation of corrective receipts for negative stock points.
